title: Cubed Textures
description: A modern texturepack that focuses on the realism aspect of Minecraft!
body:
![Banner](https://imgur.com/Zy6xS5k.gif) ## What is Cubed Textures? Cubed Textures is a realistic Minecraft resource pack made for building enthusiasts and aspiring architects. Over 100 unique models, 300+ new textures, Custom Item Models and more, all without the use of mods. Our many unique features provide an in-depth building experience, with styles ranging from medieval and traditional to modern. This pack is currently in active development - don't miss out on the exciting new updates!
*This video was made for the latest CubedPack 7.0, for all the new additions check out the [Discord](https://cubed.community/discord)
## Features This pack requires 1.14.4 [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) Make sure to enable **Connected Textures** and **Fancy Trees**
Biome Dependencies Cubed Textures uses biomes to enhance your experience; changing furniture types, leaves and their berries, and the colour of water. For a full reference of furniture, blocks and flora affected by biomes, check the reference sheet [linked here](https://cubed.community/texturepack/biomes/)! To change biomes, use WorldEdit \[​either singleplayer or server-based\] with the command: `//setbiome ` Water Bioming is explained below with the biome names: ![Water Biomes Names](https://i.imgur.com/9dlYUAv.png) Example of Water Bioming: ![Water Biomes Example](https://i.imgur.com/iHRXA4w.png)
Custom Item Models Custom item models are pieces of decor obtained through renaming one of Minecraft’s many items: it can be anything from food to full-on furniture. **How do I obtain an item model?** - Take an anvil and the item you plan to use - Rename it on the anvil - Place the item on an item frame. ![Other Item Models](https://i.imgur.com/XAhh4q9.png) ![Sign Item Models](https://i.imgur.com/2tlEvQ6.png) ![Painting Item Models](https://i.imgur.com/MgX8ZMl.png) ![Non Name Item Models](https://i.imgur.com/ujjuz1v.png)
Project Screenshots | [![Plane](https://i.imgur.com/0NsDkxv.png)](https://cubed.community/discord) | [![Building Facade](https://i.imgur.com/A7Fr7qo.jpg)](https://cubed.community/discord) | |-|-| | [![Rooftop](https://i.imgur.com/SpVSFM0.jpg)](https://cubed.community/discord) | [![City](https://i.imgur.com/6yGdimc.jpg)](https://cubed.community/discord) | | [![Custom Terain](https://i.imgur.com/hrljhuL.png)](https://cubed.community/discord) | [![Default Terain](https://i.imgur.com/1XJnXF6.jpg)](https://cubed.community/discord) | | [![Interior](https://i.imgur.com/GovyJzt.png)](https://cubed.community/discord) | [![Flower Field](https://i.imgur.com/AnvLPW9.jpg)](https://cubed.community/discord) |
[![Model Reference Sheet](https://imgur.com/i0SB80D.png)](https://cubed.community/texturepack/models/) | [![Biome Reference Sheet](https://imgur.com/KKi9rR6.png)](https://cubed.community/texturepack/biomes/) :-------------------------:|:-------------------------:
## More from Cubed
Cubed Pack - Modpack Cubed Textures uses BlockStates and Biomes to add many textures and models to the game. Technically you don't need any mods except for OptiFine to build with this resource pack. However in singleplayer this can become a bit tricky when trying to build with the many redstone and noteblock textures. That's where the [Cubed Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cubed-pack) modpack comes in, it includes a few mods which will make it a lot easier to build with all the textures this pack has to offer! [![Cubed Pack - Modpack](https://i.imgur.com/88RXxQb.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cubed-pack)
Cubed Textures - Dark UI If you prefer a darker UI, then the [Cubed Textures Dark UI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubed-textures-overlay) resourcepack might be just for you! Make sure to load it above the main Cubed Textures pack. [![Cubed Textures - Dark UI](https://i.imgur.com/S66RM6e.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubed-textures-overlay)
Cubed Textures - Pack Repository This world is an overview of all the blocks, models and textures this pack has to offer. [Download it on Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/cubed-textures-pack-repository-download-1-14-4/) ![Repository Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/hVClZWW.png)
Cubed Community - Minecraft Server ![play.cubed.community](https://i.imgur.com/MCUKxF3.png)
﻿[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/gQWEz6f.png)](https://cubed.community/discord) | [![GitHub](https://i.imgur.com/iztLhFG.png)](https://github.com/cubedcommunity/CubedTextures) | [![Website](https://i.imgur.com/PLUKfyL.png)](https://cubed.community/) :-------------------------:|:-------------------------:|:-------------------------:
## Need help? For assistance, [**JOIN THE DISCORD**](https://cubed.community/discord)! Remember to install Optifine and enable Connected Textures in settings. If you have bad shadows on models, set shadows to 50% in settings. _This pack is intended for creative-mode use only_. This is not suitable for survival-mode. We will release a version for survival-mode eventually!
